meaning: adj.油的,油滑的,油腔滑调的
examples: He was wiping his hands on an oily rag.
Milk, oily fish and eggs all contain vitamin D.
There's a lot of evidence that oily fish, as distinct from fatty meat, has a beneficial effect.
In the Pacific Northwest, Pinot Gris is renowned as the dream match for the oily richness of salmon.
More than half take up eating oily fish (53%) and 46% eat more fruit and vegetables.
